'''Korriz''' was an industrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Korriz system/Legends|Korriz system]] in the [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Worlds]], a region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] within the [[Stygian Caldera]] [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]]<ref name="Atlas" /> [[Esstran sector/Legends|Esstran sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Located on the [[Descri Wris]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], Korriz was part of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] before its collapse in the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] of [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],<ref name="Atlas" /> and around that [[Time/Legends|time]], it was the site of a [[Tritos Nal's workshop|workshop]] owned by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Tritos Nal]]. Agents of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Lord known as the [[Patron]] went to Korriz in order to steal [[Garu's Warblade]], a [[Sith sword]] that Tritos Nal had made for the Sith Lord [[Garu]], and they successfully stole the weapon despite the efforts of Garu's agents to stop them.<ref name="Dark Side" /> Korriz became a part of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Empire]] by the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the Empire and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], when an Imperial cargo [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was diverted from its flight plan by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] after departing Korriz.<ref name="Delivery Failure" />
